case_title: PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC VS. LESA LEWIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL (TRANSACTION ID # 100027164) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES IS GRANTED. PMGI IS ENTITLED TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT LESA LEWIS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,779.90 INCLUSIVE OF COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES AND AFTER CREDITING MS. LEWIS FOR MONIES SHE HAS PAID. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. [AFTER HEARING, ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE MODIFIED AND SIGNED BY THE COURT.] [302]

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Roger E. Jackson, Esq. of the Law Offices of Roger E. Jackson, T:707.318.2994, specially appearing for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties is GRANTED. PMGI is entitled to entry of judgment in its favor and against defendant Lesa Lewis in the amount of $2,779.90 inclusive of costs and attorney's fees and after crediting Ms. Lewis for monies she has paid.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

After hearing, ORDER and JUDGMENT were modified and signed by the Court.
